description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a low-pitched gable roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front yard features a driveway with two parked cars, a swing set, and two large trees flanking the entrance. The rear of the property includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, a covered outdoor seating area, and a dining table. Large windows and sliding glass doors line the back facade, providing ample natural light and access to the backyard amenities. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with a mix of concrete, glass, and metal elements. The property is set on a neatly manicured lawn, bordered by paved walkways and driveways.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool, patio, and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, swing set, and two large trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, one parked car, and a partial view of the backyard amenities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, sun loungers, covered patio, outdoor dining area, and large glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, pool, patio, and a car parked near the side lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rear-facing windows and grouped front windows
